title: Create WordPress Custom Posts for Zero-Result Filter Guidance Content
description:
Create WordPress custom post content for each filter's zero-result guidance. When a filter returns 0 records, the corresponding WP post content is displayed to help the user.

WordPress post IDs by filter:
- Views: 10336
- Line of Business: 10329
- Topics: 10331
- Status (Analytics): 10332
- Date Created: 10333
- Date Last Modified: 10334
- Refreshing Dashboards and Reports list: 10335
- Created By: 10338
- Last Modified By: 10339
- Folder: 10352 (added by Waqar, was missing)
- Status (workflow): 10353 (added by Waqar, separate from analytics status)
acceptance_criteria: Each filter has a corresponding WP custom post with helpful guidance
Post IDs are mapped correctly in the application
Folder and workflow Status posts are included
middleware_changes: Mapped each filter type to its corresponding WordPress post ID for zero-result content retrieval.
api_changes: Fetches WordPress custom post content by post ID when filter returns zero results.
implementation_notes: Waqar discovered that 'Folder' and 'Status (workflow)' post types were missing from the initial list and created WP posts 10352 and 10353 to cover them.
comment_summary: Waqar identified missing custom post types for Folder (10352) and Status workflow (10353), created them, and deployed to development.
